items.title: Stage + commit produces a real commit
items.expected: Commit appears; nothing-staged → GIT_NOTHING_TO_COMMIT; empty message → GIT_COMMIT_EMPTY_MESSAGE.

items.title: Create + switch branches; injection rejected
items.expected: Valid creates+switches; invalid → GIT_BRANCH_INVALID; duplicate → GIT_BRANCH_EXISTS.
items.evidence: GitService.test.ts: valid create/switch, invalid-name reject, duplicate reject.

items.title: Push sets upstream on first push, never forces
items.expected: New branch pushed with upstream set; remote shows the branch.
items.evidence: GitService.test.ts: 'pushes a new branch by setting upstream' (bare origin).

items.title: Merge to main merges + pushes; conflict aborts cleanly
items.expected: Clean branch merges + pushes; conflict → GIT_MERGE_CONFLICT, tree left clean on source.

items.title: Clicking a changed file shows its HEAD-vs-working diff
items.expected: Side-by-side Monaco diff renders; new = empty left, deleted = empty right.
items.waiver: DiffViewer builds + typechecks and reuses the proven HEAD/working endpoints; the visual diff was not manually exercised this session. Accepted for finalization — to confirm on next REPO use.
items.evidence: tsc + build clean; endpoints covered by editor tests.

items.title: REPO commit/branch/push/merge flow from the UI
items.expected: Each action succeeds with a toast; push/merge confirm first; errors via toast.
items.waiver: Branch switch via the SearchSelect was exercised in-app (session screenshots); the commit/push/merge-to-main click-through was not. Backend ops are proven by T1–T4. Accepted for finalization — to confirm on next REPO use.
items.evidence: Branch dropdown verified in-app; backend proven by GitService.test.ts.

items.title: Build + typecheck + tests pass
items.expected: tsc (both), frontend build, npm test all exit 0.
items.evidence: Backend + frontend tsc EXIT=0; frontend build OK; full suite passed.
